response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy, with a strong background in software development and a history of working with various technologies.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proven ability to work across the stack and pick the right tool for the job
concerns: Limited direct experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
No clear evidence of prior exposure to AI-native engineering environments
Basic German language skills may be a limitation
